multiple reputation oracle sources - Prevents low-reputation dominance through minimum thresholds - Emergency fallback to equal weighting","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasGovernanceRights(address)":{"params":{"account":"Address to check"},"returns":{"_0":"True if has governance rights"}},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"previewWeight(address)":{"params":{"user":"The address to check"},"returns":{"weight":"The weight multiplier (1e18 = 100%)"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"requestGovernanceAddressUpdate(uint8,address)":{"params":{"newAddress":"The new address","paramType":"The parameter type to update"},"returns":{"proposalId":"The created proposal ID"}},"requestGovernanceParameterUpdate(uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"newValue":"The new value","paramType":"The parameter type to update"},"returns":{"proposalId":"The created proposal ID"}},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. calculateWeightedStake(address,uint256).details: Formula: effectiveStake = stakeAmount × (reputationScore / BASE_MULTIPLIER)      - If weighted staking is disabled, returns stakeAmount unchanged      - Reputation scores are clamped between min and max bounds      - Uses default reputation if oracle returns 0 or is inactive

params._reputationOracle: Address of the reputation oracle contract

returns._0: The version number ( 0 if no controller )

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params._newOracle: Address of the new reputation oracle

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

batchCalculateWeightedStake(address[],ui.notice: Batch calculate weighted stakes for multiple users

calculateAndRecordWeightedStake(address,.notice: Calculate effective stake and emit event (for state-changing operations)

calculateWeightedStake(address,uint256).notice: Calculate effective stake based on reputation

defaultReputationScore().notice: Default reputation for users without a score (1.0 = 100%)

emergencyPause().notice: Emergency pause function (available to emergency admin even when governance disabled)

hasGovernanceRights(address).notice: Check if address has governance rights

maxReputationScore().notice: Maximum reputation score cap to prevent excessive dominance (10x = 1000%)

minReputationScore().notice: Minimum reputation score to prevent zero/near-zero weights (0.1 = 10%)

previewWeight(address).notice: Preview the weight that would be applied to a user's stake

reputationOracle().notice: The reputation oracle used for score lookups

requestGovernanceAddressUpdate(uint8,add.notice: Request address parameter update through governance

requestGovernanceParameterUpdate(uint8,u.notice: Request a parameter update through governance

setDefaultReputationScore(uint256).notice: Update the default reputation score for users without reputation

setDefaultReputationScoreByGov(uint256).notice: Update default reputation score ( governance or admin )

setMaxReputationScore(uint256).notice: Update maximum reputation score ( governance or admin )

setMinReputationScore(uint256).notice: Update minimum reputation score ( governance or admin )

setReputationBounds(uint256,uint256).notice: Update the minimum and maximum reputation score bounds

setWeightedStakingEnabled(bool).notice: Enable or disable weighted staking (emergency toggle)

weightedStakingEnabled().notice: Whether to use weighted staking (can be disabled in emergencies)
